description_long: This elderly person is depicted as a male figure with a robust build, wearing a dark blue, padded jacket over a gray shirt and matching gray pants. His shoes are brown and sturdy, suitable for walking outdoors. The figure has a bald head with a pronounced brow and jawline, and his facial features include deep-set eyes and a slightly open mouth. His hands are large and fingers are slightly curled, giving a sense of age and strength. The posture is upright, with arms slightly outstretched to the sides, and the overall appearance suggests a practical, everyday urban attire. The clothing is plain with no visible patterns or accessories, emphasizing functionality over style.
description: An elderly man with a bald head, wearing a dark blue jacket, gray pants, and brown shoes, stands upright with arms slightly outstretched. His facial features are pronounced and his attire is practical and plain.
description_view_0: Front view shows the elderly man’s facial features, open mouth, and the full front of his dark blue jacket and gray pants.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of his bald head, nose, and the side seam of his jacket and pants.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of his head, the full back of the jacket, and the straight alignment of his arms and legs.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile of his face, the jacket’s sleeve, and the side of his pants and shoes.
attribute_clothing_style: Wearing a dark blue padded jacket, plain gray pants, and brown shoes; the clothing is casual and functional with no visible patterns or accessories.
attribute_posture: Standing upright with arms slightly outstretched to the sides.
attribute_hairstyle: Bald with a light gray coloration on the scalp.
attribute_facial_features: Pronounced brow and jawline, deep-set eyes, slightly open mouth, and no visible facial hair or glasses.
